heading: Special rules for injury investigations for certain section 1303 or section 1671(c) countervailing duty orders and investigations
label: 1675b Special rules for injury investigations for certain section 1303 or section 1671(c) countervailing duty orders and investigations
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsecs. (a)(2) and (c), is defined in to mean section 1303 as in effect on the day before .Section 1303 of this titlesection 1677(26) of this titleJan. 1, 1995

children.heading: Investigation by the commission upon request
children.label: 1 Investigation by the commission upon request
A
children.text: applies to merchandise that is the product of a Subsidies Agreement country, and

children.label: i
children.text: is in effect on the date on which such country becomes a Subsidies Agreement country, or

children.label: ii
children.text: is issued on a date that is after the date described in clause (i) pursuant to a court order in an action brought under ,section 1516a of this title

children.heading: Description of countervailing duty orders
children.label: 2 Description of countervailing duty orders
children.text: A countervailing duty order described in this paragraph is an order issued under section 1303 of this title or with respect to which the requirement of an affirmative determination of material injury was not applicable at the time such order was issued.1section 1671(c) of this titleSee References in Text note below.1

children.label: A
children.text: in the case of an order described in paragraph (1)(B)(i), within 6 months after the date on which the country described in paragraph (1)(A) becomes a Subsidies Agreement country, or

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of an order described in paragraph (1)(B)(ii), within 6 months after the date the order is issued.

children.label: A
children.text: in the case of an order described in paragraph (1)(B)(i), the date on which the country described in paragraph (1)(A) becomes a Subsidies Agreement country, or

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of an order described in paragraph (1)(B)(ii), the date on which the order is issued,

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this section, the provisions of this subtitle regarding evidence in and procedures for investigations conducted under part I of this subtitle shall apply to investigations conducted by the Commission under this section.

children.heading: Time for Commission determination
children.label: B Time for Commission determination
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in subparagraph (C), the Commission shall issue its determination under subsection (a)(1), to the extent possible, not later than 1 year after the date on which the investigation is initiated under this section.

children.heading: Special rule to permit administrative flexibility
children.label: C Special rule to permit administrative flexibility
children.text: In the case of requests for investigations received under this section within 1 year after the date on which the WTO Agreement enters into force with respect to the United States, the Commission may, after consulting with the administering authority, initiate its investigations in a manner that results in determinations being made in all such investigations during the 4-year period beginning on such date.

children.heading: Net countervailable subsidy; nature of subsidy
children.label: 2 Net countervailable subsidy; nature of subsidy

children.heading: Net countervailable subsidy
children.label: A Net countervailable subsidy
children.text: The administering authority shall provide to the Commission the net countervailable subsidy that is likely to prevail if the order which is the subject of the investigation is revoked. The administering authority normally shall choose a net countervailable subsidy that was determined under or subsection (a) or (b)(1) of . If the Commission considers the magnitude of the net countervailable subsidy in making its determination under this section, the Commission shall use the net countervailable subsidy provided by the administering authority.section 1671d of this titlesection 1675 of this title

children.heading: Nature of subsidy
children.label: B Nature of subsidy
children.text: The administering authority shall inform the Commission of, and the Commission, in making its determination under this section, shall consider, the nature of the countervailable subsidy and whether the countervailable subsidy is a subsidy described in Article 3 or Article 6.1 of the Subsidies Agreement.

children.label: i
children.text: the administering authority shall order the termination of the suspension of liquidation required pursuant to subsection (a)(4), and

children.label: ii
children.text: the countervailing duty order shall remain in effect until revoked, in whole or in part, under .section 1675(d) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Upon being notified by the Commission that it has made a negative determination under subsection (a)(1), the administering authority shall revoke the countervailing duty order, and shall refund, with interest, any estimated countervailing duties collected during the period liquidation was suspended pursuant to subsection (a)(4).

children.heading: Limitation on negative determination
children.label: ii Limitation on negative determination
children.text: A determination by the Commission that revocation of the order is not likely to result in material injury to an industry by reason of imports of the subject merchandise shall not be based, in whole or in part, on any export taxes, duties, or other charges levied on the export of the subject merchandise to the United States that were specifically intended to offset the countervailable subsidy received.

children.heading: Countervailing duty orders with respect to which no request for injury investigation is made
children.label: 4 Countervailing duty orders with respect to which no request for injury investigation is made
children.text: If, with respect to a countervailing duty order described in subsection (a), a request for an investigation is not made within the time required by subsection (a)(3), the Commission shall notify the administering authority that a negative determination has been made under subsection (a) and the provisions of paragraph (3)(B) shall apply with respect to the order.

children.heading: Pending and suspended countervailing duty investigations
children.label: c Pending and suspended countervailing duty investigations

children.text: in the case of an investigation in progress, make a final determination under within 75 days after the date of an affirmative final determination, if any, by the administering authority,section 1671d(b) of this title

in the case of a suspended investigation to which applies, make a final determination under within 120 days after receiving notice from the administering authority of the resumption of the investigation pursuant to , or within 45 days after the date of an affirmative final determination, if any, by the administering authority, whichever is later, orsection 1671c(i)(1)(B) of this titlesection 1671d(b) of this titlesection 1671c(i) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: an order issued under subsection (a)(1)(B)(ii) for purposes of subsection (a)(3); and

children.label: B
children.text: an order issued under subsection (a)(1)(B)(i) for purposes of subsection (a)(4).

children.heading: Publication in Federal Register
children.label: d Publication in Federal Register
children.text: The administering authority or the Commission, as the case may be, shall publish in the Federal Register a notice of the initiation of any investigation, and a notice of any determination or revocation, made pursuant to this section.

children.heading: Request for simultaneous expedited review under section 1675(c)
children.label: e Request for simultaneous expedited review under section 1675(c)

children.heading: Requests for reviews
children.label: A Requests for reviews
children.text: Notwithstanding and except as provided in subparagraph (B), an interested party may request a review of an order under at the same time the party requests an investigation under subsection (a), if the order involves the same or comparable subject merchandise. Upon receipt of such request, the administering authority, after consulting with the Commission, shall initiate a review of the order under . The Commission shall combine such review with the investigation under this section.section 1675(c)(6)(A) of this titlesection 1675(c) of this titlesection 1675(c) of this title

children.heading: Exception
children.label: B Exception
children.text: If the administering authority determines that the interested party who requested an investigation under this section is a related party or an importer within the meaning of , the administering authority may decline a request by such party to initiate a review of an order under which involves the same or comparable subject merchandise.section 1677(4)(B) of this titlesection 1675(c) of this title

children.heading: Cumulation
children.label: 2 Cumulation
children.text: If a review under is initiated under paragraph (1), such review shall be treated as having been initiated on the same day as the investigation under this section, and the Commission may, in accordance with , cumulatively assess the volume and effect of imports of the subject merchandise from all countries with respect to which such investigations are treated as initiated on the same day.section 1675(c) of this titlesection 1677(7)(G) of this title

children.heading: Time and procedure for Commission determination
children.label: 3 Time and procedure for Commission determination
children.text: The Commission shall render its determination in the investigation conducted under this section at the same time as the Commission’s determination is made in the review under that is initiated pursuant to this subsection. The Commission shall in all other respects apply the procedures and standards set forth in to such reviews.section 1675(c) of this titlesection 1675(c) of this titlesection 1675(c) of this title
